div.style: width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 9px; font-family: MiSans; font-weight: 400;

span.style: font-size: 101px; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); text-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px; line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap;

div.style: width: 121px; height: 121px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: transparent; backdrop-filter: none; border-radius: 0px;

max-width: 101px; max-height: 101px; flex-shrink: 0; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); filter: drop-shadow(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 0%; overflow: hidden;

span.style: font-size: 101px; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); text-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px; line-height: 1; white-space: nowrap;
